audit_items.proof_trace: The primary file is inside `extern/OpenNI-Linux-x64-2.2.0.33/` — a vendored, pre-built third-party OpenNI SDK (copyright PrimeSense Ltd.), not libfreenect's own code. Libfreenect's source files (`src/DeviceDriver.cpp`, `src/ColorStream.cpp`, `src/DepthStream.cpp`) never include `OpenNI.h` nor call `Device::_getHandle()`; they implement the driver-level interface (`oni::driver::DeviceBase`/`StreamBase`). The one unchecked call (`VideoStream::create()` at line 2620) is entirely within the vendored SDK, outside libfreenect's codebase.
